programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: NYC Woman Seeks Love in Amsterdam
programs.desc: An NYC woman leaves everything for one last shot at finding love and starting a family in Amsterdam; she searches for her dream man as well as the dream apartment, but with Amsterdam's housing crunch, those dreams may be in jeopardy.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Community Connection vs. Comfort in Tulum, Mexico
programs.desc: A couple looks to escape their hectic Miami lives and slow down in Tulum, Mexico; he pictures a walker's paradise in the heart of the older downtown, but she wants a spacious and luxurious new build in the suburbs.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: The Return of Ciao House, Puglia Edition
programs.desc: The celebrity chef of "Ciao House" is back again this season; the stakes are even higher as he hunts for a seaside farmhouse in Southern Italy.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: After their daughter's birth, a young couple leaves Florida for a better work-life balance in Valencia, Spain; he's hoping to replicate the space and luxury of their suburban home, but she's looking to enjoy city life and save money for traveling.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: Charmed by an Amsterdam vacation, an adventurous Oregon family looks to relocate and go all-in on the Dutch way of life; dad looks to experience life in the city, but mom wants the kind of spaciousness that's only found in the outskirts.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Recapturing the Excitement of Their Youth in La Drova, Spain
programs.desc: After 30 years together, two ex-circus performers decide to shake up their quiet life and relocate to La Drova, Spain; he wants a secluded standalone house and doesn't mind reno projects, but she wants a traditional Spanish home that's move-in ready.
